friction_model.guarantee: EXEC-EV1 cost >= SV2.3 parent cost; EXEC-EV1 net PnL <= SV2.3 net PnL per lane/scenario

future_phase.name: RT-HISTSEED1
future_phase.summary: Startup historical-position reconstruction. Iron rules: separate bucket, never blended into forward synthetic PnL, never eligible for testnet/live transport.

liquidity_tiers.note: Modeled typical perp half-spreads; assumption, not measured quotes.

modeled_depth_disclaimer: Depth/liquidity is MODELED from historical candle volume, not real historical order-book depth (which does not exist; Hyperliquid public l2Book is a current snapshot only). Every cost is an assumption.

scenarios.description: SV2.3 base terms plus tier half-spread, square-root impact (coef 20 bps), and full market-style fill probability.
scenarios.label: EXEC-EV1 base depth-aware

scenarios.description: SV2.3 conservative terms plus 1.5x tier half-spread, square-root impact (coef 40 bps), and a 2% unfilled-chase term.
scenarios.label: EXEC-EV1 conservative depth-aware

scenarios.description: SV2.3 stress terms plus 2x tier half-spread, square-root impact (coef 80 bps), and a 5% unfilled-chase term.
scenarios.label: EXEC-EV1 stress depth-aware
